ship_blockers.claim: adapters/pi/extension/index.ts:318 dispatchEngineAsSubprocess uses execSync with shell-string interpolation; multi-line handoff content with backticks/$()/etc. is shell-injection prone
ship_blockers.verdict: REAL — escaping only handles double-quotes via .replace(/"/g, '\\"'). Untrusted EngineHandoff content (per the very layer-protocol the row enforces) is shell-evaluated. Fix: use execFileSync(['pi', '--prompt', engineHandoffMarkdown]) bypassing shell entirely.
